MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Quiet Title. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. E. Porcher Shaye Hester, Esq. appeared on behalf of the plaintiff. No named defendantg appeared, and default entered, the Court ordered Quiet Title as to the subject property.
